text: Now let me analyze the conversation.rs and config.rs files which are also large. Let me search for function definitions systematically:

tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input:
{"command": "for file in /Users/gladyscavero/Documents/PEOPL/GitHub/claw-code/rust/crates/runtime/src/{conversation,config,session,bash_validation,worker_boot,hooks,mcp_tool_bridge,mcp_lifecycle_hardened}.rs; do
  echo "=== $(basename $file) ===" 
  grep -n "^[[:space:]]*(pub\s\+)?\(async\s\+)?fn " "$file" | head -10
done 2>/dev/null"}
